def negative_list_pop_zero_used_as_queue_operation():
    rule_id = "list_pop_zero_used_as_queue_operation"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "list.pop(0) or list.insert(0, ...) used as a FIFO queue; use collections.deque.popleft()."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
